title: Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple
tagline: Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Sri Varasidhi Vinayaka Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple of Ganesha.
overview.description: Sri Varasidhi Vinayaka Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple of Ganesha. It is located at Kanipakam in Chittoor district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The temple is about 11 km from Chittoor and 68 km from Tirupati.

topPlaces.name: Thavanampalle
topPlaces.description: Thavanampalle is a village in Chittoor district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the mandal headquarters of Thavanampalle mandal.

topPlaces.name: Diguvamasapalle
topPlaces.description: Diguvamasapalle (Eguvamasapalli) is a village in Chittoor mandal in Chittoor district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. As of 2001 it had a population of 3835 in 883 households.

topPlaces.name: Bommasamudram
topPlaces.description: Bommasamudram is a village in Chittoor district, Andhra Pradesh. This village is also called 44 Bommasamudram.

topPlaces.name: Hastinapuram
topPlaces.description: Hastinapuram is a neighbourhood of Hyderabad. It is located towards Nagarjuna Sagar highway road.

topPlaces.name: Madhavaram, Thavanampalle
topPlaces.description: Madhavaram, is a village in Thavanampalle Taluk, Chittoor district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Paminivandlavooru
topPlaces.description: Paminivandlavooru is a village in Mangalapalle Panchayat which is located in Bangarupalem mandal belonging to Chittoor district of Andhra Pradesh state in southern India.

topPlaces.name: Diguvamagham
topPlaces.description: Diguva-magham is a village in Chittoor district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Thavanampalle mandal.

topPlaces.name: Aragonda
topPlaces.description: Aragonda is a village in Thavanampalle Mandal in Chittoor District of Andhra Pradesh State, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thavanampalle, Diguvamasapalle, Bommasamudram, Hastinapuram, Madhavaram, Thavanampalle.
